body.title: Port aider block-contract editor + flexible-apply ladder (P2+P3)
body.description:
**Problem:** our DS editor died by never *choosing* to call Edit (F-B: 0 Write/Edit across 149 tool calls) and by rejecting any non-exact-unique edit with a bare error (F-C). aider avoids both: the editor emits ALL edits in ONE completion as SEARCH/REPLACE blocks, and deterministic code applies them through a forgiving ladder. This is the confirmed bottleneck (07-05 funnel) and Fable's #2-to-sort.

**Proposed shape:** a new editor path in `ArchitectEditorFlow`, behind a flag (mirror the existing `architect_editor_enabled`-style gate), that: (1) dispatches ONE completion whose response IS the edits (SEARCH/REPLACE block contract, port `editblock_coder.py::find_original_update_blocks` + the few-shot `example_messages` from `editblock_prompts.py`); (2) applies via a flexible ladder ported near-verbatim from aider `search_replace.py` — perfect -> whitespace-outdent-tolerant (`replace_part_with_missing_leading_whitespace`) -> `...`-elision (`try_dotdotdots`), plus `strip_quoted_wrapping` / `strip_filename` / difflib fuzzy filename resolution. Keep the current tool-loop editor as the default until proven.

**Affected files:** unseen_university/devices/inference/architect_editor.py (new flag-gated editor path); new pure-function apply module (port of search_replace.py). MEDIUM+ inertia (inference design center) — additive path behind a flag, LoopResult contract unchanged.
**Design rules:** flexible layers are APPLY-side ranking/forgiveness ONLY, never identity (aider itself disabled edit-distance replacement after it burned them — respect that scar); LoopResult/walk contract unchanged; feature-flag gated; ⛔ NO SQLITE.
**Scope boundary:** the block-contract editor + flexible apply, behind a flag. NOT the reflection loop (P4, separate), NOT the format ladder (P8, separate).
**Test plan:** red->green — (a) a single completion carrying N SEARCH/REPLACE blocks applies all N to a fixture; (b) a whitespace-mangled block still applies via the ladder; (c) a genuinely non-matching block fails cleanly (no silent skip). The corpus multi-file task that produced 0 edits produces edits under the flag.
**Completion criteria:** flag-gated block-contract editor applies multi-edit single completions through the flexible ladder; the 3 tests above pass; a previously-0-edit corpus task now edits.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: Flag-gated SEARCH/REPLACE block editor (P2+P3): block_apply.py ports aider's parser + forgiving apply ladder (perfect->whitespace-outdent->...-elision; edit-distance fuzzy scar deliberately NOT ported); architect_editor block_editor_enabled path runs ONE completion whose response IS the edits, applied deterministically. Proven red->green (test_block_editor_flow: multi-file task at 0 edits under tool-loop editor now edits under the flag). Default off; verdict-gating deferred to P6.
